scripts.dev: concurrently "pnpm --filter @markflow/editor dev" "tsc -p tsconfig.main.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 file:dist/main/index.js file:dist/preload/index.js && electron ."
scripts.pack: node ../../scripts/build/cleanBuildArtifacts.mjs && pnpm --filter @markflow/editor build && pnpm --filter @markflow/desktop build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac zip && node ../../scripts/build/prunePackArtifacts.mjs
